name: dns-quick-change
description: It's always DNS, take control: switch DNS with presets, create your own, or revert to DHCP-provided DNS.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the `prepublishOnly` script and rerun `npm publish` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use `npm run publish` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: dns-quick-change
commands.title: DNS Quick Change
commands.description: It's always DNS, take control: switch DNS with presets, create your own, or revert to DHCP-provided DNS.
commands.subtitle: DNS

preferences.name: networkService
preferences.title: Network Service
preferences.description: Leave blank to auto-detect (Wi-Fi, Ethernet, etc.). Set manually if auto-detect fails.

title: DNS Quick Change
author: natew
